title: papilionanthe pedunculata
intro: Papilionanthe pedunculata, also known as the 'Himalayan Slipper Orchid', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Papilionanthe pedunculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and powder forms, which are often used to make teas, capsules, and topical applications.
